summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: Workflow references missing tests/checker.test.ts and fixtures (license-config.json, package.json) — will fail on execution. No act-result.txt artifact provided (explicitly required). Parser handles only JSON, not 'requirements.txt or similar' (task requirement). Workflow hardcodes /root/.bun/bin/bun path instead of using BUN_BIN env var. No actionlint validation mentioned. Task requires TDD + all tests run via act + act-result.txt — none delivered. Source code well-typed and modular, but incomplete. Workflow cannot execute successfully.
